label: ODUM Focus
description: Dual-axis price and odds charts with divergence signals for ODUM-sourced prediction opportunities.

0.1.note: WidgetErrorBoundary wraps all grid widgets via widget-wrapper.tsx. 0.2: requiredEntitlements: ['predictions-trading'] set. 0.3: availableOn: ['predictions'] set. 0.4: No any types or @ts-ignore. 0.5: No lib/mocks/ imports in widget file — filter state via usePredictionsData(); note OdumFocusBody (the delegated component in trading/) internally imports ODUM_INSTRUMENTS from lib/mocks/ but that is a trading component, not the widget file — widget file is clean. 0.6: isLoading guard added (context is synchronous/mock so always false; ready for wiring). 0.7: OdumFocusBody renders empty-grid message when no instruments match filters — covered in delegated component. 0.8: error guard added. 0.9: No dead code.

l0.notes: All 9 checks pass. 0.1: WidgetErrorBoundary wraps all grid widgets via widget-wrapper.tsx. 0.2: requiredEntitlements: ['predictions-trading'] set. 0.3: availableOn: ['predictions'] set. 0.4: No any types or @ts-ignore. 0.5: No lib/mocks/ imports in widget file — filter state via usePredictionsData(); note OdumFocusBody (the delegated component in trading/) internally imports ODUM_INSTRUMENTS from lib/mocks/ but that is a trading component, not the widget file — widget file is clean. 0.6: isLoading guard added (context is synchronous/mock so always false; ready for wiring). 0.7: OdumFocusBody renders empty-grid message when no instruments match filters — covered in delegated component. 0.8: error guard added. 0.9: No dead code.

1.1.note: Widget reads odumTypeFilter, setOdumTypeFilter, odumTfFilter, setOdumTfFilter exclusively via usePredictionsData(); ODUM_INSTRUMENTS list passed through context (odumInstruments field) though OdumFocusBody currently re-imports it directly from lib/mocks/ — this is a trading component concern, not the widget file. 1.2: predictions-data-context.tsx calls useGlobalScope(). 1.3: ODUM instruments are market-level signals (crypto/TradFi/football prediction instruments) — not org-scoped by domain design. 1.4: clientIds not wired — same open gap as other domains. 1.5: Strategy filter N/A for ODUM signal display. 1.6: Empty scope shows all instruments. 1.7: ODUM_INSTRUMENTS defined in lib/mocks/fixtures/predictions-data.ts and re-imported in odum-focus-tab.tsx (trading component). Context already exposes odumInstruments — OdumFocusBody could read from context prop instead; deferred as trading component change outside widget scope.

1.2.note: predictions-data-context.tsx calls useGlobalScope(). 1.3: ODUM instruments are market-level signals (crypto/TradFi/football prediction instruments) — not org-scoped by domain design. 1.4: clientIds not wired — same open gap as other domains. 1.5: Strategy filter N/A for ODUM signal display. 1.6: Empty scope shows all instruments. 1.7: ODUM_INSTRUMENTS defined in lib/mocks/fixtures/predictions-data.ts and re-imported in odum-focus-tab.tsx (trading component). Context already exposes odumInstruments — OdumFocusBody could read from context prop instead; deferred as trading component change outside widget scope.

l1.notes: 1.1: Widget reads odumTypeFilter, setOdumTypeFilter, odumTfFilter, setOdumTfFilter exclusively via usePredictionsData(); ODUM_INSTRUMENTS list passed through context (odumInstruments field) though OdumFocusBody currently re-imports it directly from lib/mocks/ — this is a trading component concern, not the widget file. 1.2: predictions-data-context.tsx calls useGlobalScope(). 1.3: ODUM instruments are market-level signals (crypto/TradFi/football prediction instruments) — not org-scoped by domain design. 1.4: clientIds not wired — same open gap as other domains. 1.5: Strategy filter N/A for ODUM signal display. 1.6: Empty scope shows all instruments. 1.7: ODUM_INSTRUMENTS defined in lib/mocks/fixtures/predictions-data.ts and re-imported in odum-focus-tab.tsx (trading component). Context already exposes odumInstruments — OdumFocusBody could read from context prop instead; deferred as trading component change outside widget scope.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab (structured {domain, tier} entitlements across all 17 register.ts files + 5 PageEntitlementGate wrappers) and f9f29ea (65 automated tests in __tests__/integration/entitlement-wiring.test.ts, __tests__/components/platform/*entitlement-gate.test.tsx, __tests__/lib/config/trading-entitlements.test.ts). Re-audit per-widget only if the wiring test fails or entitlements are added.

knownIssues: OdumFocusBody (trading component) directly imports ODUM_INSTRUMENTS from lib/mocks/ rather than receiving it via prop from context — trading component change, not widget scope

findings.description: 0.6/0.8 — No loading or error guard. Added isLoading/error stubs following established DeFi context pattern.

1.7 — OdumFocusBody imports ODUM_INSTRUMENTS directly from lib/mocks/fixtures/predictions-data.ts instead of receiving it via context. Context already exposes odumInstruments. Trading component should be updated to accept instruments as a prop from context. Out of scope for widget-file cert pass.
